## PrivaCI v1.0.2

Minor release: object artifact output, keyed pseudonymisation, and COPY
passthrough memory fix.

### Highlights

- **`ObjectWriter` plugin** — `privaci report --output` and `dry-run --report`
  accept local paths and object URIs (`s3://` when an `object_writer` plugin is
  registered). See `docs/object-output.md`.
- **Keyed masking** — `hmac_hash` and `pseudonym` actions with dedicated
  `PSEUDONYM_KEY` (distinct from anonymization salt); gated by the
  `LicenseValidator` plugin contract.
- **COPY passthrough** — binary COPY tables stream through a bounded pipe instead
  of buffering whole tables in memory.
- **`CONTRACT_VERSION` remains `1.0`** — plugin packages on contract `1.0.x` remain
  compatible.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:1.0.2
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:latest

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v1.0.2"
```

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
